title: Bestdin Cutlery Set - 16 Piece Cutlery Set for 4 People, Stainless Steel Tableware Silverware Set with Spoon Knife and Fork Sets, Ideal for Home/Party/Restaurant, Mirror-Polished & Dishwasher-Safe
features: 【Cutlery Set for 4】The Bestdin 16-Piece cutlery set includes (4) dinner knives, (4) dinner forks, (4) dinner spoons, and (4) teaspoons. It is perfect for family gatherings, banquets, or restaurant use. Our cutlery offers exceptional value for money, and we are confident you will be satisfied!

【High Quality & Dishwasher Safe】Crafted from high-quality, food-grade stainless steel, this knife and fork set is durable and resistant to deformation. Designed to ensure health and longevity, the cutlery set is non-toxic, nickel-free, and corrosion-resistant. Most importantly, it is dishwasher-safe for worry-free cleaning.

【Mirror Polished & Comfortable Grip】Bestdin cutlery features a polished finish with no rough spots, providing a smooth feel that ensures lip safety during use. The handles incorporate a unique micro-groove design, combined with moderate thickness and weight, to perfectly conform to the curves of your fingers for enhanced comfort.

【Versatile & High Value】Choose this cutlery sets for versatile cutlery suitable for any occasion at an affordable price! Its minimalist design complements all tableware, making it ideal for daily use, restaurants, hotels, celebrations, weddings, travel, camping, parties, catering services, and more.

【Usage & Care】Avoid prolonged exposure to saltwater or damp environments. Wipe the cutlery dry before storage to maintain its durability and appearance. Note: Do not use hard sponges, steel wool, or abrasive cleaners to prevent scratching the surface.

【Commitment to Excellence】Bestdin stands behind its promise! We are dedicated to providing premium products and services, creating delightful dining experiences for every occasion. For any inquiries, feel free to contact us at any time. Our customer support team will respond within 24 hours and provide satisfactory solutions.
description: Product Description Can this tableware set be washed in a dishwasher? Yes. Made of stainless steel with a mirror polish finish, it is resistant to high temperatures and corrosion, and will not easily deform even after repeated washing in a dishwasher. How should I clean this cutlery set? Please clean this cutlery set in soapy water. After rinsing, immediately dry with a soft cloth. For stubborn residues, we recommend using a neutral detergent to clean before wiping dry. How to maintain this cutlery set? Please clean and dry the cutlery set after using for your healthy daily use, stored in dry place for its durability. Is it suitable for everyday family use or as a gift? Both uses are ideal! It is durable and suitable for daily use, and its mirror polishing and high-quality design make it the perfect gift for festivals, weddings, or housewarming parties.
